title: notholaena marantae var. delavayi
intro: Notholaena marantae var. delavayi, commonly known as Chinese fern, is a species of fern in the family Pteridaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and fever, due to its health benefits of reducing oxidative stress and promoting overall well-being. The therapeutic actions of Notholaena marantae var. delavayi include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its bioactive constituents such as flavonoids and phenolic acids.
